request: details of customers according to region

sql_queries.title: Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Distribution of customers across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Region

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.description: Summary of customer types by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers c JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON c.CustomerID = ccd.CustomerID JOIN CustomerDemographics cd ON ccd.CustomerTypeID = cd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY c.Region, cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Total Customers
sql_queries.description: Total number of customers segmented by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(CustomerID) AS TotalCustomers FROM Customers GROUP BY Region
